dublinCore.dc:title: 119 SJ 108 IS: Providing for congressional disapproval of the proposed foreign military sales to the Government of Ukraine of certain defense articles and services.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Paul introduced the following joint resolution; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations

form.official-title: Providing for congressional disapproval of the proposed foreign military sales to the Government of Ukraine of certain defense articles and services.

section.text: That the following proposed foreign military sale to the Government of Ukraine is prohibited:

paragraph.text: The sale of the following defense articles and services, described in Transmittal No. 25–105, submitted to Congress pursuant to section 36(b)(1) of the Arms Export Control Act (22 U.S.C. 2776(b)(1)), and published in the Congressional Record on February 10, 2026: Class IX spare parts in support of U.S. Army-supplied vehicles and weapon systems, as well as other related elements of logistics and program support.
